title: Botanix to shut down after 4 years, cites weak demand for Bitcoin DeFi
summary: Botanix to shut down after 4 years, cites weak demand for Bitcoin DeFi
briefing: The Spiderchain developer told users to withdraw assets by July 9 after concluding demand for Bitcoin-native DeFi was not sufficient to support the network.

title: EU proposes ban on 11 crypto platforms in Russia sanctions push
summary: EU proposes ban on 11 crypto platforms in Russia sanctions push
briefing: The proposed measures would ban transactions on 11 crypto platforms and expand sanctions targeting networks accused of helping Russia evade restrictions.

title: SpaceX IPO nears 4 times oversubscribed, squeezing crypto and tech
summary: SpaceX IPO nears 4 times oversubscribed, squeezing crypto and tech
briefing: Tech stocks and crypto are selling off in a “classic pre-mega-IPO liquidity squeeze,” say analysts.

title: Chainalysis, South Korean police link up to fight crypto crime
summary: Chainalysis, South Korean police link up to fight crypto crime
briefing: South Korea's national police has been battling crypto-enabled crimes from DPRK-state level threats to scams targeting retail investors.

title: Hyperliquid, Paradigm urge revision of GENIUS money-laundering rule
summary: Hyperliquid, Paradigm urge revision of GENIUS money-laundering rule
briefing: The Hyperliquid Policy Center and Paradigm say the Treasury’s money-laundering rules for the GENIUS Act are too onerous for stablecoin issuers.

title: 'Maximal' ban on insider trading would hurt prediction markets, says researcher
summary: 'Maximal' ban on insider trading would hurt prediction markets, says researcher
briefing: “The same insider trade that improves the accuracy of the price today can reduce the participation that makes the price informative tomorrow,” said Balbinder Singh Gill.

title: Crypto users wary as Anthropic releases Claude Mythos with safeguards
summary: Crypto users wary as Anthropic releases Claude Mythos with safeguards
briefing: Venture capitalist Simon Dedic said Anthropic’s latest AI models drop the cost and skill needed to find crypto exploits to “basically zero.”

title: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?
summary: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?
briefing: Ether’s futures open interest fell by 25%, putting pressure on the $1,500 support level. Is a drop to $1,000 next?

summary: ‘Intense Capitulation’ Hits Crypto as 8M BTC, Bulk of ETH Supply Sit at Loss

summary: Kalshi Rolls Out New Safeguards After Insider Trading Concerns Hit Prediction Markets
briefing: Kalshi's new rules force traders to disclose their employers before trading high-risk markets flagged for insider trading or manipulation.

title: Japan's Largest Banks Plan Joint Stablecoin Launch by March 2027
summary: Japan's Largest Banks Plan Joint Stablecoin Launch by March 2027
briefing: Megabanks MUFG Bank, Mizuho Bank and SMBC have formed a council to develop frameworks for jointly issuing a stablecoin in fiscal year 2026.

summary: Crypto Tax Bills Face Pushback in House Committee Hearing
briefing: Pro-crypto Democrats questioned staking and mining tax exemptions Tuesday, while party leadership said the bills may need to wait until after the midterms.

title: EU Orders Meta to Open WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots—Meta Calls It 'Regulatory Overreach'
summary: EU Orders Meta to Open WhatsApp to Rival AI Chatbots—Meta Calls It 'Regulatory Overreach'
briefing: The European Commission has issued interim measures forcing Meta to restore third-party AI access to the WhatsApp Business API within five days.

summary: Seattle-Area Man Gets Prison for Laundering Foreign Fraud Funds With Bitcoin, Ethereum
briefing: The fraudster took in nearly $100 million from victims before laundering funds via Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins.
